subject: english
text:
Read the following passage and answer the questions that follow:
The Chakra Yuh represents a most intricate Battle Formation. It was this very ‘formation’, that Abhimanyu
had learned to break into while still in his mother’s womb! Many years later, Abhimanyu, now a sixteen-
year-old, fought on the thirteenth day of the Great War. He easily reached the centre of the circular formation
and found himself face-to-face with Duryodhana. At once several of the Kauravas rushed in to defend
Duryodhana. Abhimanyu fought valiantly and killed many of them but could not escape. After all, he hadn’t
devised a way to ‘exit’ the Chakra Yuh!
